confidence_rationale: Clear expert demonstration video with timer showing 38-second completion. All phases clearly visible with no drops or errors observed. This appears to be an instructional video showing optimal technique.
technique_summary: Expert-level performance demonstrating ideal peg transfer technique with excellent bimanual coordination, optimal path planning, and efficient movement patterns. Completion time of 38 seconds falls within expert benchmark range (40-60s), actually exceeding typical expert performance.
strengths: Perfect bimanual coordination with both instruments active simultaneously
Optimal path selection that narrows field of view as instructed
Consistent edge-grasping technique for secure peg handling
Smooth, continuous motion without hesitation or repositioning
improvement_suggestions: Performance already at expert level - no significant improvements needed
